ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the model is active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags to categorize the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizers" (
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer */,
  "optimizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimizer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the optimizer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the optimizer */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the optimizer is active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags to categorize the optimizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hyperparameter */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the hyperparameter is active */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags to categorize the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter value (e.g., float, integer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the hyperparameter was assigned to the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the hyperparameter value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the hyperparameter value is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., training, testing) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction started */,
  "ended_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the interaction (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the interaction record */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the interaction is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* AUC of the model */,
  "kappa" REAL /* Kappa of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the performance metric is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the account is locked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the log entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizer_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimizer */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_optimizer_versions_optimizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimizer_id") REFERENCES optimizers ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameter_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the last updater */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameter_versions_hyperparameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("hyperparameter_id") REFERENCES hyperparameters ("hyperparameter_id")
)
